transponderSettings.remarks: Es obligatorio el uso del Respondedor de a bordo en modo A/3 y C, excepto en corredores o sectores VFR.

properties.name: SAN MARTIN DE LOS ANDES CTR
SAP 116 REFINERÍA YPF, LUJÁN DE CUYO, MENDOZA
SAP 63 PLANTA DEPÓSITO DE GAS CÓRDOBA
SAP 64 PLANTA YPF MONTE CRISTO - CÓRDOBA
SAR 01 CAPITAL FEDERAL - AVELLANEDA Y NORTE DE LANÚS
SAN MARTIN - MENDOZA SECTOR 1
properties.remarks:
To operate in the sector, it is mandatory to submit the FPL at least 60 minutes before the start time of the activity, the constant establishment of VHF communication in both directions and the use of transponder in A3/C mode. Subsequently, communicate the termination to Mendoza Control.
The ascent over this Sector may only be performed up to 6000 FT or in coordination with Mendoza Control up to FL070 and subject to the traffic in progress.
In case SAR 109 is activated due to military activities and Hail Fight sector, the user must coordinate with the Argentine Air Force.

properties.name: SAR 37 ESTE DE MAR DEL PLATA

hoursOfOperation.remarks:
Hours of operation: SR-SS.
1 In addition to the general rules, the following particular rules shall be complied with: 
a) Before beginning the activity, you must establish communication with the TWR Córdoba and coordinate its initiation, indicating the sectors to be used.
b) During the activity, you must maintain communication in both directions with TWR Córdoba or the indicated ATS unit.
c) In the same way, the completion of the activity, or its temporary suspension, as well as the causes that motivate it, will be notified.

frequencies.name: JUAREZ CELMAN
frequencies.remarks: Frecuencia para anunciar su tráfico y si hay actividad le será informado pista activa, condiciones y tráfico de planeadores.
